name: Curry and Catastrophe Special
description: Thanks to the specialty curry you ate, your Virility is increased by 25%, your indulgent skills deal 10% more Arousal, your critical damage is increased by 25%, your critical hit chance is increased by 5%, and your chance to apply status effects is increased by 20%! However, you take 25% more damage from critical hits, your chance to receive critical hits is increased by 5%, and your resistance to all status effects is decreased by 20%.
